title: "Component Architecture"

## System Architecture Overview

### Layered Architecture

The system adopts a **Layered Architecture** with **RESTful API** principles:

```{mermaid}
graph TD
    subgraph PL["Presentation Layer"]
        IE[Identity Endpoints]
        OE[OAuth Endpoints]
    end

    subgraph AL["Application Layer"]
        PS[Profile Service]
        OS[OAuth Service]
        CS[Context Service]
        GDPRS[GDPR Service]
        AS[Audit Service]
    end

    subgraph DL["Domain Layer"]
        IA[Identity Aggregate]
        CA[Context Aggregate]
    end

    subgraph DAL["Data Access Layer"]
        PR[Profile Repository]
        OR[OAuth Repository]
        AR[Audit Repository]
    end

    subgraph IL["Infrastructure Layer"]
        DB[(Supabase PostgreSQL)]
        CACHE[(Redis Cache)]
        LOG[Logging Service]
    end

    PL --> AL
    AL --> DL
    DL --> DAL
    DAL --> IL

    style PL fill:#e3f2fd
    style AL fill:#fff3e0
    style DL fill:#f3e5f5
    style DAL fill:#e8f5e9
    style IL fill:#fce4ec
```


## Core Components

### Identity Management Component

**Responsibilities:**

- Manage base user profiles
- Handle context-specific profiles with inheritance
- Resolve profiles based on context and requester
- Support multilingual identity data
- Maintain temporal versioning

**Key Interfaces:**
```
createProfile(userId, profileData) -> Profile
getProfile(userId, context?, language?) -> ResolvedProfile
updateProfile(userId, updates) -> Profile
deleteProfile(userId) -> void
createContextProfile(userId, context, overrides) -> ContextProfile
resolveProfile(userId, context, scopes) -> FilteredProfile
```

**Internal Modules:**

- **Profile Repository**: Data access for profiles
- **Context Resolution Engine**: Applies inheritance and filtering
- **Name Validator**: Validates names across cultures
- **Localization Manager**: Handles multilingual content
- **Version Manager**: Tracks profile history


### OAuth 2.1 Authorization Component

**Responsibilities:**

- Implement OAuth 2.1 authorization server with mandatory PKCE
- Manage client applications and permissions
- Handle authorization code flow with PKCE validation
- Enforce scope-based access control
- Maintain consent records with revocation support
- Implement refresh token rotation

**Key Interfaces:**
```
authorizeClient(clientId, redirectUri, scopes, state) -> AuthorizationCode
exchangeCodeForToken(code, clientId, clientSecret) -> AccessToken
validateToken(token) -> TokenPayload
revokeToken(token) -> void
getClientInfo(clientId) -> Client
recordConsent(userId, clientId, scopes) -> ConsentRecord
```

**Internal Modules:**

- **Client Registry**: Manages OAuth clients
- **Token Manager**: Issues and validates tokens
- **Scope Engine**: Defines and enforces scopes
- **Consent Manager**: Tracks user authorizations
- **Authorization Flow Handler**: Implements OAuth flows


### Authentication Component

**Implementation Status:**

- User Registration: COMPLETED (Dec 30, 2025)
- User Login: COMPLETED (Dec 30, 2025)
- Email Verification: COMPLETED (Dec 30, 2025)
- Password Reset: COMPLETED (Dec 30, 2025)
- Refresh Token Rotation: COMPLETED (Dec 30, 2025)
- Social OAuth Integration: PENDING
- Multi-Factor Authentication: PENDING

**Responsibilities:**

- Custom JWT-based authentication
- Password management (Argon2id hashing)
- Social OAuth integration (hybrid with Supabase)
- Session management (Redis for token blacklist)
- Multi-factor authentication (TOTP)
- Account verification workflows

**Key Interfaces:**
```
register(email, password, accountType) -> User
login(email, password) -> Tokens
loginSocial(provider, providerToken) -> Tokens
refreshToken(refreshToken) -> Tokens
logout(refreshToken) -> void
verifyEmail(token) -> User
resetPassword(token, newPassword) -> void
enableMFA(userId, secret) -> QRCode
verifyMFA(userId, code) -> boolean
```

**Internal Modules:**

- **Password Manager**: Argon2id hashing and validation (passlib)
- **Token Manager**: JWT issuance and validation (python-jose)
- **Token Blacklist**: Redis-based refresh token rotation
- **Social Auth Handler**: Processes Supabase OAuth callbacks (pending)
- **MFA Manager**: TOTP generation and verification (pending)
- **Email Verification**: Token-based email confirmation (Celery async)


### Shared Services

**Authorization Service:**

- RBAC (Role-Based Access Control)
- ABAC (Attribute-Based Access Control)
- RLS integration (Row-Level Security)
- Unified authorization interface

**Audit Logging Service:**

- Records all identity operations
- Immutable audit trail
- GDPR Article 30 compliance
- Forensic analysis support

**GDPR Compliance Service:**

- Data subject rights (Articles 15-22)
- Data export requests
- Data erasure workflows
- Consent management
- Compliance reporting


## Architectural Patterns

| Pattern | Usage | Rationale |
|---------|-------|-----------|
| **Repository Pattern** | Data access abstraction | Decouples business logic from storage |
| **Service Layer** | Business logic encapsulation | Centralizes use cases |
| **Aggregate Pattern** | Domain modeling | Enforces consistency boundaries |
| **Strategy Pattern** | Profile resolution | Different strategies per context |
| **Template Method** | Authorization checks | Standardizes auth flow |
| **Observer Pattern** | Audit logging | Decouples logging from operations |
| **Decorator Pattern** | Security layers | Adds security checks transparently |


## Component Interaction Flows

### Flow 1: User Creates Professional Profile

```{mermaid}


sequenceDiagram
    actor User
    participant API as API Gateway
    participant PS as Profile Service
    participant Auth as Authorization
    participant PR as Profile Repository
    participant DB as Supabase PostgreSQL
    participant Audit as Audit Log Service
    
    User->>API: POST /profiles (context=professional)
    API->>Auth: Validate JWT Token
    Auth-->>API: Token Valid
    API->>PS: createContextProfile<br/>(userId, context, data)
    PS->>Auth: Check Permissions<br/>(can_create_profile)
    Auth-->>PS: Permission Granted
    PS->>PR: save(contextProfile)
    PR->>DB: INSERT INTO context_profiles
    DB-->>PR: Profile Created
    PR-->>PS: contextProfile
    PS->>Audit: log<br/>(event: context_profile.created)
    Audit-->>PS: Logged
    PS-->>API: Profile Response
    API-->>User: 201 Created (Profile Data)
```

### Flow 2: Third-Party OAuth Access

```{mermaid}


sequenceDiagram
    actor ThirdParty as Third-Party App
    actor User
    participant OAuth as OAuth Server
    participant Consent as Consent Screen
    participant Token as Token Service
    participant API as API Gateway
    participant Profile as Profile Service
    participant Filter as Scope Filter
    
    ThirdParty->>OAuth: GET /oauth/authorize<br/>(client_id, scopes)
    OAuth->>User: Show Consent Screen
    Note over Consent: Requested:<br/>profile:read:basic<br/>Context: professional
    User->>OAuth: Approve Access
    OAuth->>OAuth: Generate Auth Code
    OAuth-->>ThirdParty: Redirect with<br/>code=auth_xyz
    
    ThirdParty->>Token: POST /oauth/token<br/>(code, client_secret)
    Token->>Token: Validate Client Credentials
    Token->>Token: Verify Auth Code
    Token->>Token: Issue Access Token
    Token-->>ThirdParty: access_token<br/>+ scopes
    
    ThirdParty->>API: GET /oauth/profile<br/>(Bearer token)
    API->>Token: Validate Token
    Token-->>API: Token Valid<br/>(scopes, context)
    API->>Profile: getProfile<br/>(userId, context=professional)
    Profile-->>API: Full Profile Data
    API->>Filter: Apply Scope Filter<br/>(profile:read:basic)
    Filter-->>API: Filtered Profile
    API-->>ThirdParty: 200 OK<br/>(name, photo only)
```

## Cross-Cutting Concerns

These concerns span all layers:

### Authentication & Authorization
- Custom JWT token validation (HS256/RS256)
- OAuth 2.1 flows with PKCE
- Social authentication (hybrid)
- Role-based access control (RBAC)
- Scope enforcement (OAuth scopes)
- PostgreSQL RLS integration

### Audit Logging
- All operations logged
- Immutable storage
- Compliance tracking
- Security monitoring

### Error Handling
- Standardized error responses
- No sensitive data leakage
- Appropriate status codes
- Request tracing

### Input Validation
- Schema validation
- Type checking
- Length limits
- Sanitization

### Rate Limiting
- Per-endpoint limits
- Per-user quotas
- DDoS protection
- Abuse prevention

### Caching
- Profile data (5 min TTL)
- Context resolution (5 min TTL)
- OAuth clients (1 hour TTL)
- User roles (10 min TTL)

### Monitoring
- Request metrics
- Error rates
- Performance traces
- Resource utilization

### API Versioning
- URI-based (`/api/v1/`)
- Backward compatibility
- Deprecation warnings
- Migration guides


## Project Structure

```
backend/
|-- src/
|   |-- main.py                    # FastAPI app initialization
|   |-- core/
|   |   |-- config.py             # Pydantic settings
|   |   |-- security.py           # Auth dependencies
|   |   +-- database.py           # DB connection
|   |-- api/
|   |   +-- v1/
|   |       |-- endpoints/
|   |       |   |-- auth.py       # Authentication
|   |       |   |-- profiles.py   # Profile management
|   |       |   |-- contexts.py   # Context profiles
|   |       |   |-- oauth.py      # OAuth endpoints
|   |       |   +-- gdpr.py       # GDPR compliance
|   |       +-- deps.py           # Shared dependencies
|   |-- models/
|   |   |-- profile.py            # Domain models
|   |   |-- context.py
|   |   +-- oauth.py
|   |-- schemas/
|   |   |-- profile.py            # Pydantic schemas
|   |   |-- context.py
|   |   +-- oauth.py
|   |-- services/
|   |   |-- profile_service.py    # Business logic
|   |   |-- context_service.py
|   |   |-- oauth_service.py
|   |   |-- auth_service.py
|   |   |-- audit_service.py
|   |   +-- gdpr_service.py
|   +-- repositories/
|       |-- profile_repository.py  # Data access
|       |-- oauth_repository.py
|       +-- audit_repository.py
|-- tests/
|   |-- unit/
|   |-- integration/
|   +-- conftest.py
|-- supabase/                      # Supabase configuration
|   |-- migrations/                # Database migrations (SQL)
|   +-- config.toml
|-- docs/                          # Documentation
|-- requirements.txt
+-- render.yaml                    # Deployment config
```
